Privacy Policy

Last updated: 4 July 2026

We collect as little as possible and explain it plainly. This policy covers the LUMIO Coordia Intelligence website and how we handle information you share with us.

What we collect

  • Contact form submissions — your name, email, message, and budget range, if you choose to provide them.
  • Messages you send us — via WhatsApp or email, handled under those platforms' own privacy policies.
  • Language preference — stored locally in your browser (localStorage) so the site remembers your choice. It never leaves your device.

We do not run advertising trackers or sell data to third parties.

Where it is stored

Contact form submissions are stored securely in our database (hosted on Supabase) so we can respond to your enquiry and keep a record of our conversation. The website is served by Cloudflare Pages, which may process standard server logs (such as IP addresses) to deliver the site.

How we use it

Only to respond to your enquiry, scope your project, and provide services you've asked for. We do not add you to mailing lists without your consent.

Your choices

You can ask us at any time to show you, correct, or delete the information we hold about you. Contact lumiocoordia@gmail.com or message WhatsApp (+60 17 720 9159).

© 2026 LUMIO Coordia Intelligence. SSM: [to be confirmed]
